posts.author: cschoon (Clay)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Hey everyone!

Quick request: Can we please get the PDF Export functionality for the Timeline widget?

It’s already a lifesaver on the Gantt widget, and it feels like the “missing piece” for the Timeline widget.

What are you trying to achieve

Right now, I’m stuck taking screenshots when I need to send a roadmap update to stakeholders who aren’t in our workspace.

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @cschoon ,

I can’t help but suggest a different and more effective approach for working with clients outside monday on timelines instead of screenshots and PDF ping-pong. If you’re open to apps, we developed the Interactive Gantt Timeline specifically for your pain. Instead of multiple PDF versions, you have one live Gantt. All the communication and timeline suggestions are handled directly on it.

Interactive Gantt Timeline allows you to share a Gantt with clients and collaborate directly on it (no monday accounts needed):

  • Clients can leave comments and suggest timeline changes right on the Gantt

    leave suggestions2045×1045 312 KB

  • PMs get notification about comments and suggestions, and can test different scenarios, and then approve the appropriate timeline.

After approving, new timeline automatically updates the board.

Interactive Gantt Timeline doesn’t replace monday.com’s native Gantt — it enhances it.
Keep using monday.com’s Gantt view internally, and share Interactive Gantt Timeline with clients outside your workspace.

You can install and test the app on your account.
